**Benefit:** You lose one of the penalties associated with the young age category, either â2 Constitution, â2 Strength, or â2 Wisdom. Upon reaching adulthood you may exchange this feat for Great Fortitude, Iron Will, or Lightning Reflexes.

**Special:** You may take this feat up to three times. Each time you do, it affects a different penalty and must be exchanged for a different feat upon reaching adulthood.
